panel.stale: Preview is out of date — fix the form's errors to refresh it.

panel.loadFailed: The form engine could not load this form.
panel.fixErrors: Fix the form's errors to see the preview.
panel.emptyHint: The preview appears once the form has questions.

errorState.heading: The preview couldn't load this version of the form.

submission.note: This is what would be sent to a server. Nothing has left your browser.
